name: Rohit Adittya Thumati Ravi Sankar
summary: Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, production-grade applications in healthcare and insurance domains. Proven track record of driving automation (up to 91%) and reducing turnaround time (94%) using React, Node.js, Java Spring Boot, AWS, and distributed systems. Currently pursuing an MS in Computer Science (GPA: 3.95/4) at SUNY New Paltz (Expected May 2026), with experience leading Agile teams and building AI-driven solutions using RAG and LLMs.

work_experience.company: State University of New York at New Paltz
responsibilities: Engineered an AI-powered Student Advisor Application using RAG and LangChain, reducing course recommendation time by 75% and cutting manual advising errors by 80%.
Built automated prerequisite validation pipelines using vector embeddings and Weaviate to minimize hallucinations and ground responses in course documents.
Delivered an end-to-end conversational interface using React, Node.js, OpenAI API, and Ollama LLM.

work_experience.role: Senior Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Worked on a large-scale Medical Coding Application with React, Node.js, and Java Spring Boot.
Built microservices-based automation workflow engine (IAG-Engine), improving automation by 91% and turnaround time by 94%.
Implemented rule-driven auto-population workflows for CPT code generation.
Architected auditor feedback systems for quality improvements.
Led Agile ceremonies and GitHub Copilot adoption initiatives.
Improved CI/CD pipelines to enhance deployment reliability and speed.
Developed a reusable insurance portal used across multiple product lines.
Maintained 100% sprint delivery during team transition and contributed to UI library.
Built a full stack insurance application for the Hong Kong market.

work_experience.role: Junior Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Built features for a flight management portal using Angular, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL.
Reduced batch job execution time by 83%.
Improved page render time by 97% through API and performance optimizations.
Worked on a Dialogflow NLP chatbot POC to automate customer inquiries.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
